questions.answer: Yes (CONFIRM); one clarification (doc families move as unit) + one low risk (two package.json).

questions.text: Directional path-repair rule correct at every site?
questions.answer: Correct for relative requires (CONFIRM); CORRECTION that absolute literals are a separate repair class; RISK on dense compile-command-contracts.cjs.
Both directions CONFIRM; CORRECTION surface is ~6-8 not 4; RISK live import is hard failure not silent hole.

questions.text: External ref surface mapped, esp. advisor corpus?
questions.answer: CONFIRM highest-risk; NEW RISKS: runtime-target anomaly (530), parity-test volume (11+), drift-guard self-reference.

questions.text: fallback-router zero callers; wire or defer?
questions.answer: Zero callers CONFIRM; recommend DEFER to post-merge (004).

compile-command-contracts.cjs densest (~36 paths) + hash-cascade; use as forward exit gate
